meta.not_found_desc: The requested course was not found.
meta.feedback_desc: Share your experience with {{courseName}} ({{acronym}}) at {{faculty}}. Your anonymous feedback helps fellow students make informed decisions.
meta.reviews_title: Read honest, anonymous student reviews for {{courseName}} ({{acronym}})
meta.reviews_desc: Get insights on workload, assessment, and course content to help you make informed decisions.

reviews.heading: Student Feedback
reviews.empty_heading: No feedback for this course yet
reviews.empty_desc: Be the first to share your experience, or ask your friends to leave feedback! Your input helps future students make better choices.
reviews.outdated_warning: The reviews below this point may be outdated. Course content, teaching methods, and requirements may have changed since then.
reviews.ratings_only_show_one: Show {{count}} more rating without a comment
reviews.ratings_only_show_other: Show {{count}} more ratings without a comment

correction.title: Suggest correction
correction.description: Found incorrect information in <name>{{courseName}}</name>? Let us know and we'll review it.
correction.notes_placeholder: Describe what's wrong and what the correct value should be...
correction.success_description: Your correction request has been submitted. We'll review it and update the information if needed.
